name: Case
description_short: CASE Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution based in Lansing, MI, offering checking, savings, loans, credit cards, and mortgages with competitive rates.
description_long:
CASE Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial cooperative headquartered in Lansing, Michigan, celebrating 90 years of service to its community in 2026. As a federally insured credit union (NCUA-insured), CASE operates on the principle of helping members achieve their financial goals through competitive products and local service rather than generating profits for shareholders.

CASE offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including auto loans (as low as 3.99% APR with promotional $90 Meijer gift card), home equity lines of credit (6.75% APR), mortgages with flexible terms and 0% down options, credit cards (10.99% APR), and deposit accounts. Their Elite Checking account features up to 5% APY on balances plus debit card rewards. The credit union also provides specialized youth savings products like the Youth Save to Win account that gamifies saving for children and teens, and insurance services.

CASE distinguishes itself through community recognition and member-focused initiatives. The institution earned the 2026 AARP BankSafe Trained Seal, placing it among only 190 nationwide institutions whose staff completed training to prevent financial exploitation of older adults. They emphasize local processing for mortgages, transparent communication (including explicit fraud warnings about credential theft), and community financial education through partnerships like WILX-TV Studio 10. The 90-year anniversary celebration demonstrates institutional stability and commitment to member service.

As a credit union, CASE operates under different regulatory frameworks than traditional banks, potentially offering better rates and lower fees to members. However, membership eligibility requirements may apply, and service availability depends on geographic location and membership criteria. The website emphasizes security and member protection, though specific details about membership requirements are not prominently displayed on the homepage.
services: Home equity lines of credit (as low as 6.75% APR)
Mortgages (including 0% down options, refinancing, local processing)
Elite Checking accounts (up to 5% APY with debit rewards)
Youth Save to Win savings accounts (quarterly prize drawings)
Financial education (community partnerships, debt management resources)
pros: Competitive auto loan rates as low as 3.99% APR with promotional incentives ($90 gift card)
Elite Checking account earning up to 5% APY on balances plus debit card rewards
HELOC rates as low as 6.75% APR with $90 appraisal credit and flexible repayment
Mortgage options with 0% down, competitive rates, low closing costs, and local processing
Youth Save to Win account gamifies savings with quarterly prizes up to $500
AARP BankSafe Trained Seal recognition (top 190 nationwide) for elder fraud protection
90-year institutional history and ongoing community commitment with member appreciation events
cons: Membership eligibility requirements not clearly detailed on homepage; may not be open to all consumers
Limited geographic or occupational information provided; service availability unclear for non-Lansing area residents
Website lacks specific details on account opening minimums, fee structures, or membership approval timeline
No information on mobile banking app features, customer service hours, or branch locations beyond Lansing headquarters
Credit card APR floor of 10.99% may not be competitive for well-qualified borrowers compared to national card issuers
best_for: Lansing, MI area residents seeking local credit union membership with personalized service
Auto buyers looking for low-rate financing (3.99% APR) combined with promotional gift card incentives
Homeowners interested in HELOCs or mortgages with local processing and transparent terms
Savers prioritizing high-yield deposit accounts (5% APY on Elite Checking) and fraud protection oversight
diagnosis: CASE Credit Union is best for Lansing-area residents and eligible members seeking competitive rates on auto loans, mortgages, and HELOCs with the personalized service and community focus of a local credit union. The primary caveat is that membership eligibility requirements may apply, and service quality depends on meeting membership criteria—details not fully transparent on their website.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Case — Credit Union in Lansing, MI | CreditDoc
meta_description: Case — NCUA-insured credit union in Lansing, MI. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
